interpretation.positive: active-observation discrepancy stopping repairs the mean noise-OOD failure while using fewer mean operator calls than fixed PBB
interpretation.negative: NCP alone mistakes structured thin-front residuals for nonwhite noise and can stop too early on morphology OOD
interpretation.mechanism: residual magnitude carries useful noise information, while whiteness is confounded by unresolved signal morphology in this small BOST forward model
interpretation.camera_balance: the selected max-camera constraint is nonbinding on V_tune; it is not evidence for a new camera-aware algorithm

next_decision.reason: existing domains are development evidence and the tail/fresh/real-calibration gates remain binding
next_decision.next_algorithmic_control: prewhitened heteroscedastic discrepancy with real or independently simulated camera covariance
next_decision.next_model_candidate: a small deployment-input risk head may be tested only after fresh deterministic confirmation
next_decision.required_fresh_lock: new fields, noise realizations, layouts, and an independently frozen sensor-noise model

novelty_boundary.candidate_thesis_contribution: BOST-specific geometry and covariance conditioned stopping with fair forward-adjoint accounting, if fresh data confirm it
